title: Forwarding ABAP parameters to another parameterized CDS view
description: Forwarding ABAP parameters to another parameterized CDS view. Key topics: $parameters.<param_name> → References the current view's input params. Used to forward parameters to the underlying CDS view/tf. The downstream view's parameter types must match.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆$parameters. → References the current view's input params
◆Used to forward parameters to the underlying CDS view/tf
◆The downstream view's parameter types must match
◆This creates a transparent parameter chain: ABAP → View A → View B
◆@Semantics annotations must be maintained at each layer

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆$parameters. → References the current view's input params
◆Used to forward parameters to the underlying CDS view/tf
◆The downstream view's parameter types must match
◆This creates a transparent parameter chain: ABAP → View A → View B
◆@Semantics annotations must be maintained at each layer

CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_PAR_VAR'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - Forwarding parameters via $parameters'
define view ZPRAC_CDS_PARAM_VAR
  with parameters
    p1 : /dmo/travel_id,   -- Will be forwarded to ZPRAC_CDS_PARAM
    p2 : /dmo/agency_id    -- Will be forwarded to ZPRAC_CDS_PARAM
  as select from ZPRAC_CDS_PARAM( p1_travel_id: $parameters.p1, p2_agency_id: $parameters.p2 )
{
  key TravelId,
      AgencyId,
      CustomerId,
      @Semantics.date: true
      BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      BookingFee,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      TotalPrice,
      CurrencyCode,
      Description
}
details:
FLOW:

ABAP Report → ZPRAC_CDS_PARAM_VAR(p1: 'X', p2: 'Y')

↓

ZPRAC_CDS_PARAM(p1_travel_id: 'X', p2_agency_id: 'Y')

↓

/dmo/travel (database table)

KEYWORD SYNTAX:

Parameter mapping uses NAMED notation:

downstream_view( param1: $parameters.my_param1, ... )
